key_finding: R4 strong_action F1 advantage is statistically supported: vs DeepSeek delta=+0.2231 CI=[+0.0397, +0.3947] McNemar p=0.0029; vs GPT-standard delta=+0.2231 CI=[+0.0323, +0.3944]. GPT structured vs standard: delta=+0.0000 (NOT significant — structured prompt does not improve strong_action). R4 macro-F1 remains lower than DeepSeek (delta=-0.1968) — R4 is a strong_action complement, not overall winner.
